query: DELETE ci FROM complementItems ci JOIN complementGroups cg ON ci.groupId = cg.id JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001; DELETE cg FROM complementGroups cg JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001; DELETE FROM products WHERE establishmentId = 210001; DELETE FROM categories WHERE establishmentId = 210001;
